gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the GitHub repository landing page fresh with the latest community highlights.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and a robot working together to update a giant pixelated document or bulletin board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a new pixelated news clipping to a wooden bulletin board, while the bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny thumbtack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
